heading: Duration of regulations and licenses and publication of regulations
label: 506 Duration of regulations and licenses and publication of regulations
text: Regulations prescribed and licenses authorized under this chapter are effective only during the inaugural period. The regulations shall be published in at least one daily newspaper published in the District of Columbia. A penalty prescribed for violating such a regulation may not be enforced until 5 days after publication.
